# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your-namespace> # replace with your namespace
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: <app-label> # replace with the label of the application pods
  ports:
    - name: http2
      port: 80
      protocol: TCP
      tags:
        kuma.io/service: "<your-service-name>" # replace with your service name
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: ALLOW_ALL
  admin:
    accessLogs:
      enabled: true
    port: 15000
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your-namespace> # replace with your namespace
spec:
  host: "*"
  trafficPolicy:
    portLevelSettings:
      - port:
          number: 80
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
